Glimpse  

Description

1: Increase Magnification by 55%

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 5 Skill: Divination
Casting Time: 1.5 Recast Time: 12
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your eyes feel stronger.
Cast on other: Soandso 's eyes gleam.
Effect Fades: Your vision fades.

Game Description

Grants your eyes magical acuteness, allowing you to see clearly over long distances for 12 secs (2 ticks).

Items with this effect

  • Brittle Stone
  • Collector's Preserved Split Paw Eye
  • Evil Eye Lens
  • Fearful Sceptre of the Observers
  • Fearful Varnished Wooden Crook
  • Hateful Sceptre of the Observers
  • Hateful Varnished Wooden Crook
  • Preserved Split Paw Eye
  • Sceptre of the Observers
  • Spell: Glimpse
  • Varnished Wooden Crook
  • Vengeful Sceptre of the Observers
  • Vengeful Varnished Wooden Crook

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Glimpse
ClassLevel
RNG2
WIZ2
Expansion:

Duration:
2 ticks

  • Sold By (14)
  • Quested (1)

IN PoK

Aye, this is also on Pathfinder Vaered as said in another post.
▲ Page top
stupid and useless
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2006 at 1:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591846658467
42 posts
this is low lvl crap and i mean crap. of course u can find in pok. i only ever had use for this once

to climb up on top of the tower in south pok and look at the view
▲ Page top
RE: stupid and useless
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2006 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799479863
Scholar
642 posts
well, it's crap to you. it's the first divination based spell Rangers get before lvl 14 when y'all get Camoflage. i'm not sure if the fizzle rate is as high on that as it is for beasts with Invisibility, but having a cheap mana spell to keep the Div skill up and thus, helping to reduce fizzles is neither stupid, nor useless.

as a Beast, i spent a lot of time casting Sense Animal in preperation for Invisbility--back in the day when we didn't get Invis until lvl 40ish IIRC--and while Sense Animal has relatively few in game uses, it was a terrific way to keep Div skilled up.
▲ Page top
where is it
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2005 at 8:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801336457
3 posts
I found Glimpse on Pathfinder Vaered (Ranger Spells) Have fun )
▲ Page top
look
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2004 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775755155
23 posts
Look, Cynthia has not been updated by Allah but there are a LOAD of spells not said to be sold in PoK but it is... I slowly learned that on my necro apparently they hadnt hardly updated it, I had to go to Cabilis to buy a few spells, but bought millions in PoK that were said not to be sold there, you just gotta look around
